---
title: "🗂️ Drag & Drop to Dot wall"
description: "You can simply drag your image or document straight onto your Dot wall. DOT will instantly create a new Dot from the file, making it easy to start annotating, adding comments, or sharing it with your team."
navigation: true
authors:
  - name: Digital Harbor
    username: "dharbor.com"
    avatar: data:image/png;base64,
    to: https://digitalharborbolivia.com/
    target: _blank

breadcrumb: true
---

Grab a file from your desktop or any folder and drop it directly onto your Dot wall.

As soon as you release the file, DOT will automatically create a new Dot for you.

It’s the fastest way to bring your visuals into DOT without opening the capture bar—just drag, drop, and you're ready to collaborate.

<template>
  <div class="border rounded-lg shadow-md mt-4 h-60">
    <iframe src="/quickstart-capture.png" class="rounded-lg w-full h-full" scrolling="no" frameborder="0"></iframe>

  </div>
</template>

### 💡 Tips

* Ideal when you want to skip the capture bar and add visuals in seconds.

* Make sure the file you’re dragging is the one you want to share or annotate.

* Works great with images, screenshots, and documents. Whatever you need to collaborate smoothly.


::div{class="flex justify-between items-center border-t py-4 mt-10"}
